findings.description: The sentence 「システムプロパティの設定は環境設定ファイルの設定より優先される（上書きされる）。」 is not stated in the source. The source only contains a code example with a comment illustrating a specific case; it does not contain an explicit general rule about priority/override behavior.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains only the Java code block with inline comments showing one specific output result. No generalizing statement about system property priority exists in the source section.

findings.description: The label 「**クラス**: `SystemRepository`」 added before the code block has no basis in the source. The source does not contain this label or any such metadata header.
findings.source_evidence: Source section contains only a code block under the heading 「設定したコンポーネントを取得する実装例」 with no class label or descriptor.
